sections.paragraph:
with suffix פִּשְׁעִי [plur. פְּשָׁעִים] m.-

(1) defection, rebellion, Pro 28:2.

(2) a fault, a trespass, Gen 31:36 50:17 especially, sin, transgression against God, Job 33:9 34:6 , 37 Job 34:37 Psa 32:1. It appears to be a stronger word than חַטָּאת Job 34:37. Plur., Pro 10:12 Amo 1:3, . Meton-(a) used of the penalty of transgression, Dan 9:24 [?].-(b) used of a sacrifice for sin, Mic 6:7 [?].
